programme.title: Transformers: Animated: A Fistful Of Energon
programme.desc: When the AllSpark turns construction vehicles into Autobots, Bulkhead becomes fast friends. However, the Decepticons have other plans in mind.

programme.title: Transformers: Animated: S.U.V.: Society Of Ultimate Villainy
programme.desc: Prowl goes after Starscream when he escapes from the custody of the Elite Guard. However, he receives competition from Lockdown when Megatron offers a bounty on Starscream.

programme.title: Transformers: Animated: Autoboot Camp
programme.desc: The second-rate villains of Detroit team up to beat the Autobots.

programme.title: Transformers: Animated: Black Friday
programme.desc: While chasing an Autobot traitor, Bumblebee thinks back on the time he spent with Bulkhead in the Autobot Boot Camp.

programme.title: Transformers: Animated: Sari, No One's Home
programme.desc: Unlikely matchups! It's Optimus Prime and Dinobot Grimlock vs. Blackarachnia and Meltdown.

programme.title: Transformers: Animated: A Bridge Too Close, Part 1
programme.desc: Sari has to defend the Autobot home base from invading Constructicons.

programme.title: Transformers: Animated: A Bridge Too Close, Part 2
programme.desc: Megatron comes up with a plan to build a space bridge to Cybertron. However, he needs to capture Bulkhead, an expert space bridge mechanic, in order to build the bridge. Megatron's ultimate goal is to take over Cybertron and eventually the universe.

programme.title: Transformers: Animated: Transwarped, Part 1
programme.desc: The Final Battle! It's Optimus Prime and the Autobots against Megatron and the Decepticons in a fate to save both Earth and Cybertron.

programme.title: Transformers: Animated: Transwarped, Part 2
programme.desc: Sari Sumdac is coping with the newly discovered fact that she's a robot. Meanwhile, the Autobots on Earth are trying to figure out a way to warn the Autobots on Cybertron about the spy working for Megatron.

programme.title: Survivorman: The Hidden World
programme.desc: Les plants himself in Bigfoot hot spots across North America, collecting stories and experiences from Bigfoot believers, gathering and examining evidence to debunk the mysteries that surround this ancient legend.

programme.title: Survivorman: Cook Islands, South Pacific
programme.desc: Les, equipped with only his scuba gear, is abandoned by his crew at sea to recreate a frightfully common occurrence; separated from your boat and left alone in the ocean waters.

programme.title: Survivorman: Utah Canyonlands
programme.desc: Stroud will cannibalize the mountain-bike he has ridden into the middle of nowhere. He also has a multi-tool, a magnesium flint stick and an old energy bar that he uses for a purpose other than eating

programme.title: Survivorman: Kalahari
programme.desc: Les has his work cut out for him surviving in the scorching red sands of the Kalahari Desert. With only enough water for four days, Les mimics the Bushmen and sits still in the shade during daylight.

programme.title: Survivorman: Arctic Tundra
programme.desc: In the land of the midnight sun, Survivorman heads in to 72°.46 N – the northern tip of Baffin Island. On-route the boats are surrounded by a pod of orca.

programme.title: Survivorman: Grenada Jungle
programme.desc: Les treks through the thick mountain rainforest to survive on the peak of Grenada's largest active mountain. Mona Monkeys, tarantulas, scorpions, armadillo, parrots and possums all live in this vibrant ecosystem, offering an abundance of food and danger.

programme.title: Survivorman: India
programme.desc: Les takes his survival skills to the Indian subcontinent, where he accidentally stakes out a shelter right in the heart of a tiger's territory.

programme.title: Survivorman: Tierra del Fuego
programme.desc: Les will be dropped into this inhospitable landscape of Tierra del Fuego, Argentina, the easternmost tip of Isla Grande and left to survive with no food, no shelter, no water, and no safety gear or camera crew.

programme.title: Survivorman: Frigate Island
programme.desc: Les first strands himself on an uninhabited island called Frigate an active volcano chain found in the Grenadine Islands deep. Surviving on the island means scouring the shoreline, securing freshwater, building a shelter and making fire.

programme.title: Survivorman: Indonesia Mentawai
programme.desc: Les begins at the island of Siberut. He journeys 9 hours up river by boat, navigating log-jammed river systems and shallow waters, eventually trekking by foot into the heart of the island.

programme.title: Survivorman: Patagonia
programme.desc: Les Stroud travels to Patagonia – one of the most beautiful places on the planet – to teach the right way to take on adventure travel.

programme.title: Survivorman: Where the Myth Began
programme.desc: Les tracks Bigfoot in the ancient red cedar forests of northwest California. This Sasquatch hotspot is renowned for reports of Bigfoot, and the forest is crawling with black bears. Will Les brave its dangers and catch Sasquatch on camera?

programme.title: Survivorman: Oregon
programme.desc: Survivorman Legends tells the real life stories of people who survived: those who suffered terribly but made it through and those who died trying.

programme.title: Survivorman: Plane Crash
programme.desc: For a week, Les will have to survive in the brutally cold and snowy wilderness with only an axe, multi-tool and a single blanket to aid him.

programme.title: Survivorman: Grenada Island
programme.desc: Les journeys to an active volcano chain found in the Grenadine Islands. Stranding himself on an uninhabited island called Frigate, Les is left to survive on his own.

programme.title: Survivorman: Searching the Southwest
programme.desc: Les follows a trail from Texas to Utah in his quest to catch Bigfoot on camera. Locals report encounters in haunted mountains and spooky canyons, and Les applies scientific methods and his survival skills to lure the legend out of hiding.

programme.title: Survivorman: Tonga
programme.desc: Les strands himself on a deserted island in the archipelago of Tonga with a long-time friend to relive the story of marooned sailors.

programme.title: Survivorman: Canadian Boreal Forest
programme.desc: The Boreal Forest is home to 85 species of mammals including; moose, deer, bear and wolves. Crisscrossed by rivers and lakes, the Boreal forest is frost-free for only about three months of the year.

programme.title: Survivorman: MacGyverisms
programme.desc: This show features Les' best tips and tricks, the methods that Les has created over his 25-year career of surviving that he calls McGyverisms.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: A community is rocked by the death of a well-respected nurse in a car accident, but seed pods in her hair suggest something sinister.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: When a woman disappeared without a trace, there were two possible explanations: kidnap or murder. Concern was heightened when police learned that two other women had vanished under similar circumstances.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: Hikers near Anchorage, Alaska discovered a body wrapped in sheets, which were edged in orange stitching. Clinging to the sheet were threads of evidence, which led straight to the killer.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: The news of a flight attendant's brutal murder prompted the son of a victim who had been killed five years earlier to contact police. The MO of both murders was remarkably similar.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: A two-man shrimp boat sinks when a fast-moving, a violent storm strikes the Louisiana coast, and a deckhand is considered a hero for trying to save the drowned captain, until his body is found.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: When a wealthy real estate tycoon went missing, it appeared to be foul play. He had been aware that he was in danger. In his will, he left instructions regarding what was to happen if he died under violent circumstances.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: The cold-blooded murder of an American tourist in a Mexican resort focused law enforcement resources on both sides of the border.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: The investigation of the kidnapping of a prominent banker's wife led police on a wild goose chase, tracking down disgruntled bank customers and examining computer fonts.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: A man has no recollection of stabbing his wife, pushing her into the swimming pool and holding her head under the water.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: A house erupted in flames on a cold January night, killing one person and injuring another. The survivor blamed a kerosene heater. The evidence at the scene did not support her story, and she was charged with arson and murder.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: In 1957 a man committed a number of crimes in one night. 50 years later with new and improved technology, police were able to prove their case.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: Investigators piece together tiny clues at the scene of a hit-and-run accident. Their findings help to track down the offending driver.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: When an elderly couple dies in a house fire, police suspect their son to be the culprit. Will further investigation reveal the truth?

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: Police instigated an intense search when the mother of two children went missing and, less than a day later, they found her body. How did forensics help detectives?

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: Some skeletal remains and a single red hair of a woman are found in a remote area. Investigators use forensic science to identify the victim and killer.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: When a woman went missing on holiday, all police found was her shoes. Video evidence suggested there might be a killer afoot.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: A woman is found dead in bed with a gun in hand and suicide notes close by. It looks like suicide, but curious evidence suggests otherwise.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: Investigators must piece together fragments of a computer disc to discover who murdered the wife of a serviceman in the Philippines.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: When a man was murdered in a bomb blast, investigators must sift through shards of evidence to hone in on the perpetrator.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: The wife of an Air Force officer was found dead in her bed, with a plastic laundry bag near her face. See how did the forensics team piece together this limited evidence.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: Police search for a missing boy. First they find his backpack, then his body, but can they track down the killer?

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: When police arrive at the scene of a car accident, the bloody mess they find leads them to suspect foul play.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: Two victims are found in an irrigation canal and questions are asked as to whether a killer can be caught if the evidence is washed away. Police turn to nearby footprints for answers.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: In the light of day, a DNA picture painted by a molecular biologist and new clues are revealed about a traffic accident during the night.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: When a young girl is found dead, police quickly make an arrest, but could cutting-edge technology from NASA prove the wrong man is behind bars and a killer is on the loose?

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: Investigators turn to forensic evidence to determine whether a missing teacher has just gone on holiday or is the victim of a crime.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: When a man's wife kills herself 14 years after his college sweetheart committed suicide, police start to get suspicious. Is is coincidence or double murder?

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: Detectives discover that a woman shot on her drive had recently rejected a co-worker half her age. Did his love turned into obsession and a motive for murder?

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: With a long list of suspects, forensic experts are clear on one thing in this brutal murder, the killer knew his victim.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: Police are on the hunt for a serial killer. Could a bloody fingerprint on one of his victims be the breakthrough they need?

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: When the only witnesses to a horrific murder were the victim's dogs, police call in a canine behavioural expert with the hope of making a breakthrough in the case.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: A cold-blooded killer believes he has found an ingenious way to cover his crime, but he hasn't banked on the talented team of forensic scientists out to catch him.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: A husband and wife had been shot to death in their bedroom. Investigators thought their 16-year-old daughter was lucky to have escaped unharmed.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: When a hairdresser is murdered in her salon, evidence fails to convict a suspect. The case goes cold for ten years, until a mysterious witness finally speaks up.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: Police investigate the possibility of a hate crime when two women go missing and are later found murdered.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: An 18-month-old skeleton found on marshland puts forensics to the ultimate test. But with no name and no face, how much can computer construction help a case?

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: Having bagged-up the evidence and thrown it into a river, a multi-murderer is shocked to hear police have recovered it. But is there enough in the bag for them to convict a killer?

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: In a tragic twist of fate, a woman is found dead just days after she sold her home and moved out. Find out if she anticipated an attack, and who had wanted her dead.

programme.title: Giant Constructions: Moving Bridges
programme.desc: Moving Bridges: Exotic milestones on moveable infrastructure. Historically significant: the Kaiser Wilhelm Bridge and the Michigan Avenue bridge. Mechanically unique: the Pont Jacques, the Gateshead Millennium Bridge or the Scale Lane Bridge.

programme.title: Giant Constructions: Railway Bridges
programme.desc: Railway bridges fascinate through different construction methods from masonry, truss-beam bridges to steel-concrete arch bridge. Heavier loads, faster speeds, more frequently: trains speed over bridges and the maintenance teams face ever larger challenges

programme.title: Mega Builders: Ice Hotel
programme.desc: Building the world's largest structure of snow and ice is a mega challenge of towering proportions. Anything can go wrong. And often it does.

programme.title: Mega Builders: Sinking Wings
programme.desc: The goal is to turn the coastal waters off southern British Columbia in Canada into the wreck-diving capital of the world by sinking massive objects, wait a few years for the fish to move in, and the corals to grow.

programme.title: Mega Builders: Glitz City
programme.desc: In Las Vegas -- the quintessential city of razzle-dazzle and bling -- MGM is going for the ultimate one-upmanship.

programme.title: Mega Builders: Floating Bridge
programme.desc: Engineers had no choice. They had to build a "floating bridge" in Kelowna, British Columbia. Lake Okanagan was too deep and too muddy to sink columns to support a standard bridge.

programme.title: Mega Builders: Raising the Roof
programme.desc: A new iconic stadium rises in Rio De Janeiro. The futuristic Joao Havelange Olympic Stadium will be the main venue for the 2007 Pan Am Games.

programme.title: Mega Builders: Extreme Surf Machine
programme.desc: Although Christoph Kiessling is now running “the best waterpark in the world” with the world’s largest artificial wave - it’s still not enough. This megalomaniac millionaire is always dreaming of bigger and better things.

programme.title: Mega Builders: Spanning the Saigon River
programme.desc: In Ho Chi Minh City (formerly known as Saigon), engineers are on a mission to modernize. Construction is underway to raise Phu My Bridge, a brand-new $100 million cable-stayed bridge.

programme.title: Giant Hubs: Rungis Food Market
programme.desc: Rungis International Market is the world's largest wholesale market for fresh produce. Fish, meat, fruits, vegetables, cheese and even fresh flowers are sold here every day in quantities so large an entire train station.

programme.title: Giant Hubs: Shinjuku Station
programme.desc: A look behind the scenes of the world’s busiest station: Shinjuku Station! Five separate train lines, almost three thousand passengers per minute and trains arriving every second.

programme.title: Giant Hubs: Munich Airport
programme.desc: The Munich based Franz Joseph Strauss Airport is rated the only 5-Star airport in Europe. And it is also one of Europe´s biggest hubs. An average 1.100 flights have to be taken care of every day, 44.6 million passengers chose Munich as destination.

programme.title: Giant Hubs: UPS Worldport
programme.desc: What does it take to deliver millions of packages and documents every day right in time? You need a Giant Hub: UPS Worldport in Louisville is a technological marvel. It is the largest automated package handling facility in the world.

programme.title: Giant Hubs: Moscow Metro
programme.desc: It is one of the biggest and busiest metro systems in the world: The Moscow Metro. During rush hour the trains are running every 90 seconds to transport around 9 million people daily – that makes 2.3 billion a year.

programme.title: Giant Hubs: Port of Rotterdam
programme.desc: The Port of Rotterdam is among the largest logistics centers in the world. With a handling capacity of about one million three hundred thousand tons – per day!

programme.title: Mega Builders: Bangkok Bridge
programme.desc: The new 13-km Industrial Ring Road will be a combination of elevated roads, bridges and tunnels, designed to help ease the congestion in Bangkok.

programme.title: Mega Builders: Ice Hotel: Bigger, Colder
programme.desc: Building an eighty-room hotel of snow and ice in just six weeks every year isn’t a big problem for Ake Larsson, but the weather certainly is.

programme.title: Mega Builders: Peak Power
programme.desc: Deep in Canada's rugged western coastal mountains a new hydroelectric project is underway. It's a 600 million dollar venture diverting massive glacial rivers into a huge pipeline built against down steep mountain slopes.

programme.title: Mega Builders: World's Biggest Wave Machine
programme.desc: On the resort island of Tenerife, just off the coast of North Africa, a small army of designers and labourers are building what will be the largest man-made surfing wave in history - and one of the most ambitious waterparks ever conceived.

programme.title: Wardens: Three Stories, One Bear
programme.desc: Michigan Conservation Officers investigate a bear killed during the season's opening weekend.A suspicious bag of trash left at a state park. Why every successful bear hunter has to turn in a tooth from his kill.

programme.title: Wardens
programme.desc: It's a late night for two Michigan Conservation Officers as an investigation into a hunting blind on federal property turns into much more.The area is also home to a once nearly extinct bird that is now making a comeback.

programme.title: Wardens: Chasing the Big One
programme.desc: Montana Wardens spend a week tracking the killer of two out of season deer.Anonymous tips and eye witness accounts keep the Wardens hot on a trail filled with many twists and turns.

programme.title: Random Breath Test

programme.title: Behind Bars The Worlds Toughest Prisons: Antanimora Prison, Madagascar
programme.desc: Desperate overcrowding, rats, and disease come standard in Antanimora Prison. Surrounded by the capital Antananarivo, it's bursting at the seams. It was originally built for 800 prisoners, but now it contains more than 3,000 prisoners.

programme.title: British Gangsters: Faces of the Underworld: Cons to Icons
programme.desc: In the final episode, Bernard O'Mahoney explores the media’s influence on creating celebrities out of criminals. Is it possible to create a gangland persona based purely on false headlines? Yes, but there are certain to be consequences...

programme.title: British Gangsters: Faces of the Underworld: My Generation
programme.desc: Bernard O'Mahoney looks at the effect of time on gangs and their reputations. Whether it be organised motorcycle groups or Irish travellers, the roots are dying out with every new generation, but how does this affect the older, more traditional members?

programme.desc: With candid dashboard camera footage of bungled arrests, kamikaze crooks and cop-based carnage of all shapes and sizes, Cops Uncut is the ultimate American police trooper blooper reel.

programme.title: Rookie Blue: The Kids Are Not Alright
programme.desc: Andy has her sights set on a much-needed long weekend. But when a routine highway check leads to the discovery of a teenage boy in the trunk of a car, Andy and Gail must convince him that no heartache lasts forever

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Poison Pill
programme.desc: After a messy drug arrest, Andy and Marlo are quarantined together. Meanwhile, 15 Division springs into emergency response mode in order to get the contaminated drugs off the streets before a deadly outbreak sweeps through the city.

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Skeletons
programme.desc: When a young woman is reported missing, the officers of 15 Division soon discover a possible copycat connection to one of their division’s most distressing cases. With the clock ticking, Gail must face her worst fears..

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Friday the 13th
programme.desc: When human bones found in a ravine open up a 15-year-old missing persons case, Swarek reunites with his old training officer to solve the case

programme.title: Rookie Blue: For Better, For Worse
programme.desc: Everyone at 15 Division, especially Andy, just wants a quick, smooth shift so they can get to Frank and Noelle’s wedding. But things get complicated when they get called to a hijacked casino bus full of senior citizens

programme.title: Rookie Blue: What I Lost
programme.desc: When Chris returns for a visit, his reunion takes a shocking turn when his son, Christian, is abducted while under the care of Andy and Nick

programme.title: Rookie Blue: You Are Here
programme.desc: Near the end of shift, 15 Division busts a marijuana grow-op – a case that becomes Traci’s first homicide and forces Andy, Nick and Gail to work overtime

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Deception
programme.desc: When a suspected pedophile is found beaten within an inch of his life, Andy discovers Marlo has been conducting a mania-fueled, off-hours “investigation”

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Under Fire
programme.desc: After Andy and Chloe take fire from an unseen shooter, the officers realize they are the targets of someone with a grudge against 15 Division

programme.title: Rookie Blue: You Can See the Stars
programme.desc: In the wake of a targeted attack on the officers of 15 Division (ep. 412), Andy, Swarek, and their fellow officers have to piece together the truth about a past crime in order to find Oliver Shaw – in time to save his life

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Blink
programme.desc: In the aftermath of the night’s traumatic events, Andy and Dov try to pull themselves together at an all-night diner, but are caught off-duty and off-guard in a volatile diner hold-up.

programme.title: Rookie Blue: All by Her Selfie
programme.desc: Oliver gets promoted and Andy is tasked with training 15 Division’s newest rookie, Duncan Moore. But when Andy and Duncan respond to a messy homicide at a pawnshop, it’s clear this rookie is going to give Andy the challenge of a lifetime.

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Heart Breakers, Money Makers
programme.desc: When Andy and Nick’s seizure at an illegal gambling house leads to a suspicious confession, Andy recruits Sam to help figure out who’s lying, why, and where the money is, before anyone gets hurt.

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Wanting
programme.desc: When a tenement-building shooting leads to the discovery of an executed gang leader, 15 Division must race to find the killer before a gang war breaks out

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Going Under
programme.desc: When 15 Division goes undercover at a club-land bar that’s a possible hub for illegal handguns, Chris’s erratic behavior and concern for a specific drug dealer make Dov suspicious.

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Two Truths and a Lie
programme.desc: As the officers of 15 Division try to hunt down the killer of Brian Gowdy – Andy and Sam go on the road to interview a list of inmates at Millburn Penitentiary.

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Deal with the Devil
programme.desc: In the midst of a chaotic day at the station, Oliver prepares Andy to defend herself at Duncan’s dismissal hearing, now happening two hours from now

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Exit Strategy
programme.desc: Chris’s addiction issues come to a head when an innocuous call to a middle-class home puts Dov and Chris in the middle of a suspicious home invasion investigation

programme.title: Rookie Blue: "Moving Day"
programme.desc: 15 Division is assigned to a community outreach program, “Moving Day”, to help tenants move out of a subsidized-housing complex that’s being torn down

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Fragments
programme.desc: Andy’s former rookie, Duncan, is back on duty and looking to reconcile – something she’s not ready for yet. But personal feelings get thrust aside when a bomb explodes in a downtown parking garage

programme.title: 3 Generations
programme.desc: Hoping to get support from his mother (Naomi Watts) and grandmother (Susan Sarandon), a New York teen (Elle Fanning) prepares to transition from female to male.

programme.title: From Prada to Nada
programme.desc: After the sudden death of their father leaves them penniless, two spoiled sisters (Camilla Belle, Alexa Vega) get a rude awakening when they must live with their aunt in East L.A.

programme.title: The Choice
programme.desc: An irresistible attraction leads to a blossoming romance between a feisty medical student (Teresa Palmer) and her new neighbor (Benjamin Walker).

programme.title: 3 Generations
programme.desc: Hoping to get support from his mother (Naomi Watts) and grandmother (Susan Sarandon), a New York teen (Elle Fanning) prepares to transition from female to male.

programme.title: The Glass Castle
programme.desc: Based on a memoir, four children struggle to grow up in a rambling, poverty-stricken, wildly unconventional environment overseen by their dysfunctional yet uniquely loving parents.

programme.title: After Life
programme.desc: Balu falls in love with Swapna at first sight, but their parents oppose the match and suggest they wait a year to see if they are truly in love.

programme.title: The Eye
programme.desc: Following a double corneal transplant, a concert violinist (Jessica Alba) perceives frightening images of a world that only she can see.

programme.title: The Glass Castle
programme.desc: Based on a memoir, four children struggle to grow up in a rambling, poverty-stricken, wildly unconventional environment overseen by their dysfunctional yet uniquely loving parents.

programme.title: 3 Generations
programme.desc: Hoping to get support from his mother (Naomi Watts) and grandmother (Susan Sarandon), a New York teen (Elle Fanning) prepares to transition from female to male.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict: First Breath
programme.desc: A college friend of Renee's resurfaces and leads them on an investigation of the link between the Taelons and a biomedical facility's cloning operation.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict: Sins of the Father
programme.desc: A Senator's daughter is found to have kryss in her system. Liam and Renee suspect the Taelons lied about synthesizing it and there is a new location for production. They believe Federov is involved. Da'an is addicted to kryss.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict: Limbo
programme.desc: The Taelons lend some of their dwindling core energy to Joshua Doors for a pilot cold fusion project, but the energy is stolen, leaving the Taelons vulnerable. Jonathan Doors lives on as an AI in cyberspace.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict: Motherlode
programme.desc: Augur is caught and placed in a special prison where he is placed in a sensory deprivation chamber. An amoralist gets him out and wants Augur to help him steal the gold Zo'or has on the mothership. When Liam learns of what happened he tries to find Augur.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict: Take No Prisoners
programme.desc: The ANA negotiate amnesty for all resistance members, Liam tries to convince resistance member Halley Simmons to take the offer. Sandoval uses parasites to make volunteers do suicide missions against the resistance.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict: The Second Wave
programme.desc: The Taelons decide to leave Earth when it appears that the Jiridians are invading. Meanwhile, a group of Resistance prisoners saved from the mother ship include several disguised Jiridians who are causing trouble for Liam and Renee.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict: Essence
programme.desc: Renee's brother has PTSD. In a desperate effort to help him, she agrees to let him undergo special treatment. The treatment removes his emotion. The project is overseen by Sandoval and the emotion they take is given to Da'an.

programme.title: The Lost World: True Spirit
programme.desc: Veronica and Marguerite use a ouija board to communicate with Malone, who Veronica believes is trapped in a spirit realm. However, their attempt may have aroused the spirit of Saros, a dead warlord.

programme.title: The Lost World: The Knife
programme.desc: Malone's time in the spirit realm has given him psychic abilities. When he and Challenger discover a morbid campsite, Malone is encouraged to use his new powers to solve the case of Jack the Ripper.

programme.title: The Lost World: Fire in the Sky
programme.desc: A dying stranger issues a warning to three of the explorers, begging them to find a hunter named Pierson Rice. Roxton shares a common, painful past with the mysterious Rice.

programme.title: The Lost World: Dead Man's Hill
programme.desc: Roxton stumbles into a bizarre Wild West alternate reality when he finds his name on a tombstone. Roxton meets the other explorers' pioneer-town personas.

programme.title: The Lost World: Hollow Victory
programme.desc: Challenger experiments with a new fuel source in the hot-air balloon, and takes the other explorers along for a test ride. However, a storm drags the balloon into a dangerous underground world.

programme.title: Sanctuary: Resistance
programme.desc: Helen and Henry break into a government abnormal research facility called SCIU - only to find it is run by Tesla. Biggie and Will deal with an annoying abnormal named Galvo.

programme.title: Sanctuary: Homecoming
programme.desc: Will's trip to Liberia turns bad when he suffers a head trauma from an attack. The trauma brings up powerful memories about his mothers death and the inadequacies of his father. Magnus deals with be-winged scam artist.

programme.title: Sanctuary: Icebreaker
programme.desc: Henry and Declan lead a team to rescue a crew of a Russian icebreaker and the abnormal passengers

programme.title: Sanctuary: Fugue
programme.desc: FBI Agent Abby Corrigan's life is endangered after she is suddenly attacked by an unfamiliar abnormal during an investigation. Magnus and Will's heated debate over the best way to help Abby threatens to permanently alter their relationship

programme.title: Sanctuary: Chimera
programme.desc: There is a sentient organic nanite causing havoc in the computer system in the Sanctuary. Magnus and Tesla connect their minds to the system in an effort to isolate the nanite. They find Adam Worth instead

programme.title: Sanctuary: Acolyte
programme.desc: A radical group of abnormal beings plan a terrorist attack with the goal of starting a war between surface dwellers and hollow Earth inhabitants. To Magnus' disbelief, Addison, at the NSA, has proof of Biggie's leadership of the group.

programme.title: Sanctuary: The Depths
programme.desc: When Magnus and Will learn of a plan to capture very rare and dangerous Abnormal, they travel to a remote cave to prevent then hunt.

programme.title: Sanctuary: Sanctuary for None Pt 1
programme.desc: When the Sanctuary is approached by an abnormal leader about a radical plan for peace, Magnus goes all in and pledges her full support. However, when Will is forced to leave the Sanctuary, his decision may just put everyone at risk.

programme.title: Alien Paranormal: Bigfoot, UFOs and the Men in Black
programme.desc: Are Bigfoot creatures traveling to earth in UFO's, and being covered-up by Men in Black? Experience terrifying, real events as documented by top authorities, including: Aliens attacking a house; Alien Abductions to create a hybrid race; vortexes and more!

programme.title: Close Encounters: Proof of Alien Contact
programme.desc: This documentary examines whether UFOs are real. It studies over 250 amateur video clips, evaluates several recent revelations about Roswell, and examines footage of the removal of an alien implant.

programme.title: Alien Agenda: Planet Earth
programme.desc: Alien Agenda Planet Earth reveals the shocking truth about UFOs and Extraterrestrials, a truth that has been suppressed and hidden for centuries.

programme.title: From the Mothman to the Reptilians: A Guide to Alien Species
programme.desc: Witnesses from around the world have had close encounters with extraterrestrial races, shaping our imagination and becoming cultural phenomena.

programme.title: 27 Alien Encounters
programme.desc: Strange and bizarre UFO encounters abound, but recent Alien encounters by highly credible eyewitnesses are so unusual and perplexing that they challenge our understanding of physics and the Universe as we know it.

programme.title: Ancient Engineers: Aliens On Earth
programme.desc: Our evolution may be influenced by our ancestors and their Gods. We are not alone in the universe.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries: Belgian UFO
programme.desc: This episode includes: Belgian UFO, (Pts. 1 & 2), UD: I.D. Swap, Brenda's Fire and Philip Breen & UD.

programme.title: Alien Mass Sightings: The Undeniable Truth
programme.desc: Documentary analyzes mass alien sightings, questions reliability of official explanations, identifies common patterns for further investigation.

programme.title: Alien Global Threat
programme.desc: New evidence reveals that world governments have had a pact with aliens for decades and that human abductions are being allowed by government and military factions.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries: Kecksburg UFO
programme.desc: This episode includes: Kecksburg UFO (Pts. 1 & 2), Update: Pizza Man & 3rd Anniversary Reunion, Unknown Arsonist & UD and Hospital Babynap.

programme.title: Alien Mass Sightings: The Undeniable Truth
programme.desc: Documentary analyzes mass alien sightings, questions reliability of official explanations, identifies common patterns for further investigation.

programme.title: Alien Global Threat
programme.desc: New evidence reveals that world governments have had a pact with aliens for decades and that human abductions are being allowed by government and military factions.

programme.title: Area 51, Roswell Crash, Alien Abductions
programme.desc: Area 51 is located at the center of UFO research and legends of extra-terrestrial folklore. It is located six hundred miles west of Roswell, New Mexico, where the infamous Roswell UFO crashed in 1947. Also in this episode The Allagash Alien Abductions .

programme.title: Alien Cyclops: The Extraordinary Case of Sagrada Familia
programme.desc: In 1963 Brazil, three children witness a UFO in their backyard. An alien cyclops descends, and Mr. Alberto investigates the phenomenon.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries: UFO Odyssey
programme.desc: This episode includes: UFO Odyssey, Reporter's Trucker and Haunted Mansion.

programme.title: The Falcon Lake Incident
programme.desc: Aliens visit Earth often; Canada's 1967 Falcon Lake UFO incident stands out. Canada's frequent sightings make it enigmatic.

programme.title: Tattoo Fixers: Episode 7
programme.desc: Drag queen Devon feels snared by his barbed-wire tattoo because it's a painful reminder of an ex. Alice welcomes Halloween-loving Chippy, whose portrait of her daughter is more than a little spooky.

programme.title: Tattoo Fixers: Episode 1
programme.desc: The team tackle Sam's embarrassing tattoo, which has earned him a serious ultimatum, deal with holiday ink that Ryan doesn't remember getting, and rid Adam of a lasting reminder of his ex.

programme.title: Tattoo Fixers: Episode 10
programme.desc: Alice rids Sammie of an unladylike error, and Sketch erases Lloyd's misunderstood etching.

programme.title: Tattoo Fixers: Episode 11
programme.desc: Alice cooks up a treat for ex-chef Melody. Jay helps Az make a wise choice about his past.

programme.title: Tattoo Fixers: Episode 4
programme.desc: Michael needs help with a holiday tattoo that's writing cheques his anatomy can't cash. Superfan Emma wants to commit to ink her love for Cheryl Fernandez-Versini. A fire-eater lights up Jay's eyes.

programme.title: Tattoo Fixers: Episode 2
programme.desc: Sketch slays Fiona's zombie, while Glen gives magician George a frightening new friend.

programme.title: Tattoo Fixers: Episode 8
programme.desc: Victoria is in desperate need of a tattoo cover-up so she can train as a teacher. Abigail gets inked at the age of 75, Hollie loses her cheeky chicken ink, and Lisa divorces a big tattoo mistake.

programme.title: Tattoo Fixers: Episode 9
programme.desc: Alice paints over Francesca's pitiful Picasso. Sketch gives Madison a memorial to her mum.

programme.title: Tattoo Fixers: Episode 5
programme.desc: Sketch conceals a large portrait on Les. Alice spreads Becca's favourite food on her leg.

programme.title: Tattoo Fixers: Episode 15
programme.desc: Love is in the air as Glen rids Riley of her Valentine's issues, Jay fixes Leon's bedroom problems, Alice works on Suzanne's cocky Cupid, and Sketch divorces Jordan from his tattoo.

programme.title: Tattoo Fixers: Episode 11
programme.desc: Jay covers Jack's offensive nickname tatt, while Sketch sweeps away Mark's cobwebs.

programme.title: Tattoo Fixers: Episode 8
programme.desc: Eccentric dancer Marina wants a confidence-boosting tattoo cover to get her back onto the podium. The artists see double when identical twins Hayley and Rebecca come in with matching bad body art.

programme.title: Tattoo Fixers: Episode 15
programme.desc: Hayley's cheeky cartoon tattoo is threatening to derail her wedding plans. Mick wants to cover an X-rated inking that's causing embarrassment to his daughter. Dom's saucy camel is giving him the hump.

programme.title: Tattoo Fixers: Episode 4
programme.desc: Michael needs help with a holiday tattoo that's writing cheques his anatomy can't cash. Superfan Emma wants to commit to ink her love for Cheryl Fernandez-Versini. A fire-eater lights up Jay's eyes.

programme.title: Tattoo Fixers: Episode 1
programme.desc: Vicky celebrates her family with an animal tribute tattoo, Abby's cringe-worthy celebrity crush is covered, Jordan needs to lose the ink he got to win an argument, and Adam has a rather personal tatt.

programme.title: Tattoo Fixers: Episode 3
programme.desc: Glamour model Bex wants to put her Jedward tattoo behind her, and Andy has an inspirational tattoo story. Annie hopes to fix a tattoo that, after a mid-inking disagreement, didn't turn out as planned.

programme.title: Tattoo Fixers
programme.desc: Our artists make Nicole's bum look less laddy, save teacher loving George from detention, and stop Joanne from getting spanked. Distraction desiring Reece, Turkish offender John and gardening lover James also get an inkjection.

programme.title: Tattoo Fixers: Episode 10
programme.desc: Scott's terrible tattoo takes his love for Norwich City FC too far. Jay has space-loving Dan's back with an out-of-this-world cover. Sketch tackles a cover to help transgender Jai feel more feminine.

programme.title: Secrets of the London Underground
programme.desc: Tim Dunn and Siddy Holloway explore King William Street, the original terminus of the first electric Tube in the world.

programme.title: Secrets of the London Underground
programme.desc: Tim Dunn and Siddy Holloway walk the Piccadilly line at night to explore the hidden World War II remains of Brompton Road, a station that played a strategic role in the Capital's defences against the German Luftwaffe.

programme.title: Secrets of the London Underground

programme.title: Forbidden History
programme.desc: Jamie Theakston sheds light on the ultra-secretive Rosicrucian Order, whose members included Leonardo Da Vinci and Isaac Newton. Are they the real-life 'illuminati'?

programme.title: Forbidden History
programme.desc: Jamie Theakston journeys to Greece and Italy to hear the truth about oracles. These mysterious figures - such as the one at Delphi - reputedly spoke the word of the gods.

programme.title: Forbidden History
programme.desc: The startling truth behind historical legends. Jamie Theakston investigates the curious claim that the Nazis were engaged in building flying saucers during World War II.

programme.desc: Jamie Theakston brings to light the life and work of enigmatic inventor Nikola Tesla. Conspiracy theorists believe that the Serb was hushed up - but why?

programme.title: Inside the Ambulance

programme.title: The Crystal Maze Celebrity: Episode 3
programme.desc: This week’s celebrities taking on the maze are Rylan Clarke, Adil Ray, Tamara Wall and Joel Dommett.

programme.title: The Crystal Maze Celebrity: Episode 2
programme.desc: Tonight’s celebrity adventurers are Ore Oduba, Vicky Pattison, Alex Brooker, Lydia Bright and Louie Spence.

programme.title: The Crystal Maze Celebrity: Episode 5
programme.desc: This instalment of the Crystal Maze sees DJ Melvin Odoom captain comedian Al Murray, actor Kara Tointon, reality TV stalwart Olivia Attwood and actor Ashley Taylor-Dawson through the ubiquitous 4 zones.

programme.title: The Crystal Maze Celebrity: Episode 1
programme.desc: Gemma Collins – with team mates James “Arg” Argent, legendary TV personality Carol Vorderman, comedian Ellie Taylor and TV presenter Rick Edwards fighting to maintain any sense of decorum and to get a word in edge wise.

programme.title: The Crystal Maze Celebrity: Episode 1
programme.desc: Tonight’s celebrity adventurers are Steve Jones, Scarlett Moffatt, David Coulthard, Jodie Kidd & Joey Essex.

programme.title: The Crystal Maze Celebrity: Celeb 5 - The Derry Girls cast
programme.desc: Maze Master Richard Ayoade leads team captain Saoirse Monica Jackson and her fellow cast members Jamie-Lee O'Donnell, Louisa Harland, Nicola Coughlan and Dylan Llewellyn on a time-travelling adventure to collect those precious crystals.

programme.title: The Crystal Maze: Episode 12
programme.desc: This week’s adventurers call themselves Team Loveit.

programme.title: The Crystal Maze: Episode 15
programme.desc: The Ali Family are arguably the strongest team on paper ever to face the maze. Will they score a perfect ten in the zones?

programme.title: The Crystal Maze: Episode 9
programme.desc: This week the Hauxwell tackle the maze with remarkable results. How bad can it get in the maze? You’re about to find out…

programme.title: The Crystal Maze: Episode 4
programme.desc: Tonight's team, Let's Get Medical, are a group of medical students. Your lives may soon be in their hands. You may have concerns after witnessing this lot attempt to tackle the mighty maze.

programme.title: The Crystal Maze: Episode 1
programme.desc: Richard Ayoade returns with a new series of everyday adventurers hoping to make it to the Crystal Dome, starting with The Gamers.

programme.title: The Crystal Maze: Episode 5
programme.desc: Tonight's team are called The Vikings because they spend most of their spare time living like Vikings. As they travel through the zones they'll be answering the question, 'can you ever have too much testosterone in a room'?

programme.title: The Crystal Maze: Episode 2
programme.desc: It's takes self-belief, attitude and quick wits to conquer the maze. Tonight's team, The London Girls, are over-flowing with two of the three. Will Maze Master Richard Ayoade ever be able to keep control of this calamitous and kamikaze bunch?

programme.title: The Crystal Maze: Episode 6
programme.desc: In tonight’s show Team Well Read and Underfed, a group of plucky students, attempt to take on the maze. Will they graduate with honours?

programme.title: The Crystal Maze: Episode 8
programme.desc: This week’s team of Welsh hopefuls met working at Pizza Hut. How will they cope with the maze when some of their team appear to have no concept of urgency?

programme.title: The Crystal Maze: Episode 7
programme.desc: An all-female footballing team hope to score in the maze tonight. Will they play defensively or go on the attack?

programme.title: The Crystal Maze: Episode 2
programme.desc: The Air Cadets bring a bravado bonanza to the maze this week. They begin the night predicting big things, but will they deliver?

programme.title: The Crystal Maze: Episode 14
programme.desc: This week it’s the turn of a team of midwives to face the maze. These five feisty females prove how important communication is, by demonstrating the consequences of not listening to each other.

programme.desc: Welcome to Staten Island, the land of fierce women who never admit to being allegedly "connected" - until now. Left alone to pick up the pieces, these women face the harsh realities of "life" after informants have turned their families' lives upside down.

programme.title: Mob Wives: Mobbed Up Mermaids
programme.desc: After sending the Philly girls packing, the ladies of the original Staten Island crew are finally at peace. But when a new girl threatens to disrupt their newfound tranquility the group is faced with some difficult decisions.

programme.title: Mob Wives: Cabin in the Woods
programme.desc: Drita is forced to defend herself when she hears the slanderous allegations from the Mermaid Parade. Karen and her boyfriend Storm face difficult decisions in their tumultuous relationship.

programme.title: Mob Wives: Hamptons Hangover
programme.desc: After Brittany and Marissa's confrontation, the Staten Island girls try to make the most out of their final days in the Hamptons. As Drita finds herself on the outs with her longtime friends, she quickly discovers an alliance with newcomer Brittany.

programme.title: Mob Wives: Flip-Floppers and Party Hoppers
programme.desc: Ang gives Neil an ultimatum after a fight about finances. While tensions between Drita and Carla run high at Ang's birthday party, Karen continues to deal with her father's critics.

programme.title: Mob Wives: The Sitdown
programme.desc: Tired of the drama, Ang gathers the OGs in an abandoned warehouse for an old-fashioned sitdown. Renee works to convince her son and his girlfriend to move in with her. Karen finds herself in the middle of a feud between Brittany and Marissa.

programme.title: Mob Wives: Younger Version of the Same Old BS
programme.desc: Loyalties are called into question after Marissa and Brittany wage war on each other forcing the other women to take sides. Drita seeks out inspiration for her book, as well as Lee's blessing. Ang gets some unexpected news about her health.
programme.sub-title: Younger Version of the Same Old BS

programme.title: Mob Wives: Exes and Whys
programme.desc: Ang receives devastating news that exposes the cracks in her marriage with Neil. Brittany's issues with Renee and Carla create a stronger alliance with Drita. A troubling rumor reopens the toxic feud between Drita and Karen.

programme.title: Mob Wives: Cuts Both Ways
programme.desc: The war between Karen and Drita reaches irreparable heights when Brittany relays an explosive rumor. The women work to cheer Ang up as she faces yet another life threatening surgery.

programme.title: Mob Wives: Drittany
programme.desc: Karen works to squash the feud between Brittany, Carla and Renee but accidentally creates more bad blood. Renee's dance instructor issues a surprising challenge. Big Ang's future hangs in the balance as she waits to find out if her cancer has spread.

programme.title: Evidence of Evil
programme.desc: 'Conned to Death' covers the murder of Michele MacNeill and how investigators and forensics brought her killer to justice.

programme.title: Evidence of Evil
programme.desc: When Kelsey Berreth vanishes on Thanksgiving in 2018, blood in her house and cell phone records indicate that there is more to Kelsey's disappearance than meets the eye.

programme.title: Evidence of Evil
programme.desc: Following the investigation into a body found in a plastic container and how the killer is found.

programme.title: Evidence of Evil
programme.desc: The terrifying assault of Ronda Guzman and the investigation that reveals her attacker after 33 years.

programme.title: Evidence of Evil
programme.desc: Following the 35-year investigation and forensic advances that identify Rosa's savage killer.

programme.title: Evidence of Evil
programme.desc: Following the investigation that reveals the predator responsible for numerous sexual assaults.

programme.title: Evidence of Evil
programme.desc: The story of a sadistic crime and how investigators brought the merciless attacker to justice.

programme.title: Evidence of Evil
programme.desc: The murder of Lynette White led to the longest murder trial in British history at the time. Find out how police work and DNA eventually led police to her killer.

programme.title: Evidence of Evil
programme.desc: Rachel O'Reilly was savagely murdered in her home, in what looked like a burglary gone wrong. A ground-breaking investigation finally put her killer behind bars.

programme.title: Evidence of Evil
programme.desc: A popular, healthy, 60-year-old woman suffered a sudden, painful death. Detectives managed to trace the killer, despite their calculated and elaborate web of deceit.

programme.title: Evidence of Evil
programme.desc: A killer, who stalked and gained his victim's trust, enticed her to her death. Almost two decades later scientific advances brought the perpetrator to justice.

programme.title: Evidence of Evil
programme.desc: A man returning from a family visit stops to help what appears to be a stranded group on the Belt Parkway in Brooklyn, NY. Half an hour later, he is found dead.

programme.title: Evidence of Evil
programme.desc: The senseless and cruel murder of Florida waitress Denise O'Neill was eventually solved, following comprehensive forensics and shrewd detective work which saw her killers brought to justice.

programme.title: Evidence of Evil
programme.desc: The intriguing and complex investigation into the murder of Maggie Locascio required relentless detective work using extensive forensics to capture her killers and bring them to justice.

programme.title: Evidence of Evil
programme.desc: The story of the violent murder of Dr John Yelenic, and how the investigation into his death became one of the most infamous and shocking in Pennsylvania state history.

programme.title: Evidence of Evil
programme.desc: On the 5th December 1998, a woman was reported missing. Her car was found shortly after off the Interstate 95. Her disappearance rocked the community and tragically, her body was discovered two days later.

programme.title: Evidence of Evil
programme.desc: Exploring some of the most startling criminal cases of the past two decades where technology has changed the course of the investigations.

programme.title: Evidence of Evil
programme.desc: When Joan Giambra was murdered, DNA technology and dogged police work linked the case to a string of other murders, helping to solve the crime and rectify a miscarriage of justice.

programme.desc: CHANNEL STARTS AT 9PM Follow everyone's favorite troublemakers—Stan, Kyle, Cartman, and Kenny--from the very beginning of their unforgettable adventures.

programme.title: South Park starts at 9pm
programme.desc: CHANNEL STARTS AT 9PM Follow everyone's favorite troublemakers—Stan, Kyle, Cartman, and Kenny--from the very beginning of their unforgettable adventures.

programme.title: South Park: Pandemic (Part 1)
programme.desc: Pandemic (1): South Park goes all 'Cloverfield' when large, mysterious creatures begin causing havoc around the globe, all caught on Randy's shaky cam. The boys start a Peruvian flute band. (S12, E10)

programme.title: South Park: Pandemic 2: The Startling (Part 2)
programme.desc: Pandemic 2 - The Startling (2): Giant guinea pigs are attacking cities around the world. The boys have the key which will save humanity, but they are stuck in the Andes and bored to boot! (S12, E11)

programme.title: South Park: About Last Night...
programme.desc: About Last Night...: While the country celebrates the election of Obama, a band of unlikely super-thieves begin an audacious jewel heist. The town's Republicans fear the apocalypse is nigh. (S12, E12)

programme.title: South Park: Elementary School Musical
programme.desc: Elementary School Musical: When the all-singing and dancing musical craze hits South Park, the boys must embrace it or relinquish their popularity. Will they stick to their guns? (S12, E13)

programme.title: South Park: The Ungroundable
programme.desc: The Ungroundable: Fed up with how he is treated by his parents, the eternally innocent Butters embraces the new vampire craze a little too enthusiastically. Who will he choose to feed on? (S12, E14)

programme.title: South Park: Go God Go (Part 1)
programme.desc: Go God Go (1): Cartman is impatient to get his hands on the latest games console. Result? A visit to the atheistic future of 2546! Richard Dawkins pays a visit to South Park Elementary. (S10, E12)

programme.title: South Park: Go God Go XII (Part 2)
programme.desc: Go God Go XII (2): Cartman is stuck in the future, caught up in a battle between atheists and sea otters! And what will become of Richard Dawkins and Mrs. Garrison's love affair? (S10, E13)

programme.title: South Park: Mr. Hankey the Christmas Poo
programme.desc: Mr Hankey, The Christmas Poo: The Mayor decides to impose a holiday theme which won't offend anybody. Kyle tries to convince everyone that Mr Hankey (a singing Christmas poo) exists. (S1, E09)

programme.title: South Park: Tom's Rhinoplasty
programme.desc: Tom's Rhinoplasty: The boys become lesbians to impress a new teacher, making Wendy jealous. Also, to his delight, Mr. Garrison's plastic surgery leaves him looking like David Hasselhoff. (S1, E11)

programme.title: South Park: Mecha Streisand
programme.desc: Mecha-Streisand: Cartman and Kyle fall out over a magic triangle they un-earth on an archaeological dig. The triangle yields the power to turn Barbra Streisand into a terrible monster. (S1, E12)

programme.title: South Park: Cartman's Mom is a Dirty S**t (Part 1)
programme.desc: Cartman's Mum Is A Dirty S**t (1): Dr. Mephisto helps Cartman un-cover the truth about his dad's identity. The spotlight is on quite a few of South Park's male residents. Who could it be? (S1, E13)
programme.sub-title: Cartman's Mom is a Dirty S**t (Part 1)

programme.title: South Park: Cartman's Mom Is Still A Dirty S**t (Part 2)
programme.desc: Cartman's Mum Is Still A Dirty S**t (2): Dr Mephisto is shot before he reveals who Cartman's father is. Who exactly shot him? Meanwhile, the rest of the town try to deal with a blizzard. (S2, E02)
programme.sub-title: Cartman's Mom Is Still A Dirty S**t (Part 2)

programme.title: South Park: Chickenlover
programme.desc: Chicken-Lover: When Barbrady calls the boys in to help solve the case of the notorious, perverted Chicken-Lover, Cartman gets a little carried away with his new-found 'authoritah'. (S2, E03)

programme.title: South Park: Ike's Wee Wee
programme.desc: Ike's Wee Wee: Kyle misunderstands what circumcision is and thinks he has to save Ike's penis from being cut off! Mr. Mackey is fired, and turns to drugs - "drugs are bad, m'kay?" (S2, E04)

programme.title: South Park: Conjoined Fetus Lady
programme.desc: Conjoined Fetus Lady: Kyle is terrified because he has to see the school nurse, who has a scary deformity. Meanwhile, the school dodgeball team goes to China - only Pip can save them now. (S2, E05)

programme.title: South Park: The Mexican Staring Frog of Southern Sri Lanka
programme.desc: The Mexican Staring Frog Of Southern Sri Lanka: After being duped by Stan's Uncle Jimbo, the boys decide to take revenge by making bogus videos of a certain frog. Will Jesus stand for this? (S2, E06)
programme.sub-title: The Mexican Staring Frog of Southern Sri Lanka

programme.title: South Park: City on the Edge of Forever
programme.desc: City On The Edge Of Forever: The school bus ends up perched on the edge of a ravine after it crashes in a snowstorm. Must be time for some flashbacks then! Can these memories be trusted? (S2, E07)
programme.sub-title: City on the Edge of Forever

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: More mechanical mayhem as teams of roboteers do battle to become king of the scrap heap.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: The second round of heats sees eight new robots join the fight for The Seventh Wars title. Growler is de-muzzled as he rampages through the arena in the four-way melees, no-one is safe.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: More mechanical mayhem as teams of roboteers do battle to become king of the scrap heap. Let the trials begin!

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: The small but mighty Storm II takes on Mayhem, Rhino and Supernova in round one, as Mayhem fights its first battle. Team Steel Avenger named the heat, the Heat of Doom as it includes Supernova, Shredder Evolution and Storm II.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: Thermidor 2 and Kronic the Wedgehog meet again in a replay of another heat. Thermidor 2 puts up an impressive fight as it takes down every robot in its path.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: Heat number 11 of the series sees controversy as T-Wrecks makes a bold move that breaks the rule about having an active weapon. Round one pits Mantis, Infernal Contraption, Bulldog Breed and Jabber against one another.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: Eight robots enter the arena, including old crowd favourite, Behemoth. Heat L also features a grudge match to settle the score between Behemoth and Crushtacean.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: Champion robot Panic Attack returns in the thirteenth heat of the series. A series 5 round is replicated as the Four Horsemen and Team Panic Attack are once again pitted against each another.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: In the 14th heat of the seventh series, round one sees Spawn Again, Chip and NEATer Machine do battle with Revenge of Trouble & Strife. The next round pits Topbot against R.O.C.S and Raging Nightmare.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: As the semifinals draw near, Bigger Brother makes its mark in the arena, as it takes on Colossus and Typhoon 2 in round one. Round two sees DisConstructor tackle Xenomorph, Hammerhead 2 and Iron-Awe 2.1.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: An extensive and informative dive behind-the-scenes on the House Robots. Get inside information from designer Chris Reynolds, on what goes into creating these killing machines.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: Follow Team Chaos's journey, from humble beginnings to how they ended up building one of the most feared Robots ever to compete.

programme.title: A Haunting: Grave Awakenings
programme.desc: When ghosts confront Zoe Dei, she makes the harrowing discovery that her home harbors a paranormal portal which has awakened her dormant ability as psychic medium, forcing her to learn how to live with her newfound ability to see the dead.

programme.title: A Haunting: Eternal Grief
programme.desc: Shortly after moving into her home in Indiana, Jennifer Patterson receives a warning from a stranger that she is not alone in the house. When she hears strange voices, she begins to wonder if the previous owner, who died in the house, still inhabits it.

programme.title: A Haunting: Echoes from the Grave
programme.desc: Ron and Nancy learn their house is a way station between life and death.

programme.title: A Haunting: Marked By Evil
programme.desc: When Stephanie Winters rejects the advances of a friend, he steals a piece of her hair and threatens to put a spell on her. Soon after, Stephanie notices strange noises and objects moving on their own. Could Stephanie's friend have conjured a demon?

programme.title: A Haunting: A Haunting in Ireland
programme.desc: The Fahey family’s new addition stirs up psychic energy of a crime committed years ago.

programme.title: A Haunting: Immortal Love
programme.desc: Shortly after Whitney's family moving into their first home, a restless spirit shatters the serenity of their suburban life. Whitney calls in a paranormal team who uncover the truth behind the spirit's tragic death and his intense obsession with Whitney.

programme.title: A Haunting: Well To Hell
programme.desc: Mark Corvo finds a ceremonial alter in his attic. He reaches out to the Ghosts of New England Research Society for professional help. They believe tenants dabbling in the dark arts opened a portal to the other side and drew spirits to the location.

programme.title: A Haunting: Casa de los Muertos
programme.desc: Eddie Benitez fears the spirit of a dead man who committed suicide is slowly killing his son.

programme.title: A Haunting: Tunnel Of Death
programme.desc: Candace and John St. Clair explore a haunted tunnel with a gruesome history where slaves were buried alive. Stealthily, an uninvited guest follows them home. Attacked by the entity, they invite paranormal experts to investigate and cleanse the home.

programme.title: A Haunting: The Attic
programme.desc: A series of photographs show what you cannot see with the naked eye: an evil face in the attic.

programme.title: A Haunting: The Awakening
programme.desc: Marcy’s son is deployed with the Army. Overcome with worry, a dormant spirits threatens her.

programme.title: A Haunting: Nightmare Upstairs
programme.desc: The VanLandingham family moves to a larger house in the small town of Wynne, Arkansas. What they first consider "house-settling" noise and behavior quickly turns into a full-scale supernatural physical attack on both daughters Brianna and Heather.

programme.title: A Haunting: House of Nightmares
programme.desc: When Tracey Berrios experiences paranormal activity inside her new home, she suspects spirits tied to the house's history. But after something evil attacks Tracey, she fears for the safety of her family and turns to paranormal investigators for help.

programme.title: A Haunting: The Exorcism Of Cindy Sauer
programme.desc: Georgia single mother Cindy Sauer is finally getting back on her feet after the sudden death of her husband. But as she is recovering from her loss, nightmares and dark shadows haunt the family and mark the beginning of something far worse.

programme.title: A Haunting: Fear House
programme.desc: Steven LaChance begins to experience strange things inside his house.

programme.title: A Haunting: Angels And Demons
programme.desc: Maryland single Mom Kathie Sheats hopes life will change for the better when she marries her boyfriend Brian. But "something" inside her house has other ideas. Spiritual warfare literally breaks out...taking over Kathie's mind, body and soul.

programme.title: A Haunting: Stalked by Evil
programme.desc: A shadowy presence manifests from the darkened corners of Judy McCarthy’s Texas home.

programme.title: A Haunting: Haunted Victorian
programme.desc: After moving in their dream home, Edwin Gonzalez and Lillian Otero begin to experience strange occurrences; mysterious footsteps and unexplained noises. Lillian is physically attacked while sleeping and the couple tries to escape, but is it too late?

programme.title: Britain's Darkest Taboos
programme.desc: In the early hours of September 10, 2011, Danai Muhammadi and an accomplice used a garden spray to start a blaze that killed his estranged wife Melissa Crook, his father-in-law Mark Crook and his own baby, 15-month-old Noah Crook.
programme.sub-title: My Son In Law Burnt My Family To Death: Melissa Crook

programme.title: Britain's Darkest Taboos
programme.desc: Former Detective Superintendent David Swindle and psychologist Emma Kenny examine Gemma Hayter's childlike trust in people and look at chilling CCTV recordings that show her being led to her death.
programme.sub-title: My Disabled Daughter: Tortured And Murdered By Her Friends

programme.title: The Real Story of...
programme.desc: Singer Selena Quintanilla rises to fame before being gunned down by the manager of her fan club.

programme.title: The Real Story of...
programme.desc: Tony Mendez masterminded the escape of six diplomats from Iran during the 1979 hostage crisis.

programme.title: Royal Navy School
programme.desc: The Cornwell recruits reach the final week of their gruelling training but it's not plain sailing all the way to their passing out parade.

programme.title: Royal Navy School
programme.desc: Follow new recruits at the Royal Navy on their journey to become professional sailors. They must get through HMS Raleigh in Cornwall, the only initial training base for naval ratings in the country.

programme.title: Educating Essex
programme.desc: The school is dealing with a good kid heading in the wrong direction. Charming but cheeky Vinni was a model student when he started at the school, but since the recent break-up of Vinni's parents' marriage his behaviour has deteriorated.

programme.title: Educating Essex
programme.desc: Has Deputy Head Mr Drew finally met his match in clever but complicated student Mollie?

programme.title: Criminal Confessions
programme.desc: After a loving wife and mother is found shot to death in her own bed, the case goes cold for two years until determined detectives set their sights on justice and reveal a murder-for-hire plot.

programme.desc: Dubbed the `Vampire of Sacremento', Richard Chase murdered six people in the late 70s, engaging in necrophilia with his victims, and then bathing in their blood or eating their internal organs.

programme.desc: A gripping study of the crimes of the Boston strangler. One of the most famous serial killers in history, he admitted to 13 murders, although many still believe his confession was false.

programme.title: Medium: Allison Wonderland
programme.desc: Allison has to decode her visions when a mentally ill man dies and attempts to send her a message.

programme.title: Medium: Sweet Child O' Mine
programme.desc: A murder hits too close to home when the suspect reminds Allison of her dead child.

programme.title: Medium: Lucky in Love
programme.desc: Allison dreams that her brother is involved in a bank robbery.

programme.title: Medium: Knowing Her
programme.desc: Allison learns about Detective Scanlon's shady past.

programme.title: Medium: S.O.S
programme.desc: A serial killer uses his psychic abilities against Allison.

programme.title: Medium: The Darkness is Light Enough
programme.desc: Allison tries to help a woman prove that she is being secretly watched at night.

programme.title: Medium: Death Takes a Policy
programme.desc: Allison fears that her time is up when the Angel of Death keeps revealing himself to her.

programme.title: Medium: Twice Upon a Time
programme.desc: Allison discovers how different her life would have been if she had not married Joe.

programme.title: Medium: Be Kind, Rewind
programme.desc: Allison relives the same horrific day over and over again in her dreams.

programme.title: Medium: Ghost In The Machine
programme.desc: Allison uncovers clues to a mysterious homicide through the lens of a videocamera.

programme.title: Medium: Blood Relation
programme.desc: Allison fears that Dr. Charles Walker a psychotic killer from the 1800s is back.

programme.title: Medium: Four Dreams (Part 1)
programme.desc: When a series of brutal home invasions hit the Phoenix area, Allison hopes the dreams she and Bridgette are having will help end the executions of innocent families.

programme.title: Medium: Four Dreams (Part 2)
programme.desc: When a series of brutal home invasions hit the Phoenix area, Allison hopes the dreams she and Bridgette are having will help end the executions of innocent families.

programme.title: Medium: Profilers In Terror
programme.desc: When a young woman is found dead in a park Allison believes she may have been another victim of the notorious Suitcase Killer.

programme.title: Medium: The Whole Truth
programme.desc: When a prominent Arizona citizen is found dead by his wife, Allison is suspicious that he was murdered.

programme.title: Medium: Mother's Little Helper
programme.desc: Allison and Ariel are starting to have dreams about a crime. They are dreaming about it from different perspectives, which reveals two suspects.

programme.title: Medium: Better Off Dead
programme.desc: Allison's attempts to help two ghosts who've bonded over their respective murders are somewhat hampered by one who's left a sizable inheritance to a woman he barely knew.

programme.title: Medium: Very Merry Maggie
programme.desc: Allison becomes spooked by a young boy's doll.

programme.title: Medium: Apocalypse, Push
programme.desc: Arliss Howard reprises his role as Texas Ranger, Captain Kenneth Push, who returns to Allison's life when he experiences unnerving visions about a Phoenix-based slaying. Meanwhile, Joe tells a little white lie---and suffers the consequences.

programme.title: Medium: Second Opinion
programme.desc: After a dream, Allison faces a horrible question – What would you do if you learned that your 2-year-old daughter was going to die of leukemia in 20 years?
