programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 11
programme.desc: A slide bed loses two wheels and a lorry gets stuck in the mud.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 12
programme.desc: A 44-tonne artic verges off a country lane and gets tuck in the mud.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 13
programme.desc: A lorry rolls over on the edge of a roundabout and a truck with blown suspension.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 14
programme.desc: A serious blaze leaves a sewerage tanker stricken in a layby on the busy A1 motorway.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 15
programme.desc: A mail lorry crashes on a London street and a bashed-up Audi is wedged in a ditch.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 16
programme.desc: An overnight frost makes a road sweeper slide into a ditch.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 17
programme.desc: A trailer catches fire and a lorry smashes into a tree.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 18
programme.desc: A lorry grounded; a trucked wedged in mud; a truck crashes into a low bridge.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 19
programme.desc: A tractor topples into a ditch; a lorry is trapped in mud; a unit loses its grip on ice.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 20
programme.desc: A recovery officer struggles after a truck ends up in a ditch in difficult conditions.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 1
programme.desc: In Corby a 16-metre lorry loaded with waste flips over near a busy roundabout.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 2
programme.desc: A team rescues an overturned mixer full of cement. A driver faces hydraulic problems.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 3
programme.desc: A lorry fire poses endless problems for recovery, with burning ash complicating matters.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 4
programme.desc: A tipped-over shipment of A4 paper ends up being a tough task to take on.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 5
programme.desc: A crew trying to take care of a burned-out trailer struggles due to its missing wheels.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 6
programme.desc: Three veteran recovery experts struggle with a terribly trashed truck.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 7
programme.desc: Alpha Recovery join the team, tackling a 45-tonne crane that's become a pain.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 8
programme.desc: Kev tackles a big bin lorry, and Aidan has a brush with a bus.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 9
programme.desc: After a lorry rolls over under power lines, making a race for time.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 10
programme.desc: A 50 ton construction machine and the 20 ton trailer carrying it land in a stream.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 8
programme.desc: As the kids are pursued relentlessly by a mysterious machine, their exhaustion puts them at each other's throats.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 9
programme.desc: When Aang struggles with a block while trying to learn Earthbending from Toph, he wonders if the problem is with him or his teacher. Meanwhile, Sokka gets himself in a jam.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 10
programme.desc: A professor leads the kids to a spirit library in the middle of the desert, where Sokka hopes to discover powerful secrets to use against the Fire Nation.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 11
programme.desc: Aang searches for Appa, while Katara struggles to keep everyone together so they can survive in the vast desert. Meanwhile, Uncle and Zuko seek help from an ancient secret society.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 12
programme.desc: When the kids can't take the easy way into Ba Sing Se, they must escort a family of refugees there the hard way, through the deadly Serpent's Pass.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 13
programme.desc: Aang discovers a colossal Fire Nation invention heading for Ba Sing Se, and the kids must stop it before it destroys the great wall that protects the city.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 14
programme.desc: Aang and the kids finally arrive in Ba Sing Se to see the Earth King, only to find mysterious forces within the city conspiring to stop them.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 15
programme.desc: A series of short stories that explore the individual adventures of Katara and Toph, Uncle, Sokka, Aang, Zuko, and Momo.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 16
programme.desc: In this special episode, we go back in time to the moment Appa was stolen.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 17
programme.desc: While searching for Appa, the kids run into Jet but are torn about whether to trust him or not. Meanwhile, Zuko also hunts for Appa.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 18
programme.desc: The kids battle Long Feng when they try to show the Earth King the conspiracy taking place in his city. Zuko becomes seriously ill and has odd dreams as he faces a spiritual crisis.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 19
programme.desc: A guru at the Eastern Air Temple helps Aang take the next step in his Avatar journey. Plus, Sokka meets his long-lost father, Azula hatches a diabolical plan, and Uncle and Zuko open a tea shop.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 20
programme.desc: Everyone races against time to stop Azula's sinister conquest of Ba Sing Se. Zuko and Katara spend time together, while Aang's destiny hangs in the balance, as does Zuko's.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 1
programme.desc: After sustaining serious injuries, Aang awakens to find himself aboard a Fire Nation ship. Meanwhile, Zuko journeys home.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 2
programme.desc: To better camouflage themselves as real Fire Nation citizens, the kids check out a Fire Nation school. Also, Zuko confronts Uncle.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 3
programme.desc: The gang arrive at a suffering Fire Nation fishing village, and a mysterious spirit appears to help the villagers.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 4
programme.desc: Sokka feels that he is not contributing enough to the group, and searches for a mysterious master to teach him the ways of the sword.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 5
programme.desc: Zuko, Azula, Mai, and Ty Lee go on vacation at Lo and Li's beach house, where they learn a lot about themselves and each other. Meanwhile, the kids face a new enemy.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 6
programme.desc: Aang and Zuko are taken on parallel adventures that give them insight into their forefathers' pasts, but how does the tale of Roku and Sozin matter to them now?

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 7
programme.desc: When Toph discovers a quick way to make cash, Katara disapproves, and the rift between them has disastrous consequences.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 8
programme.desc: In a spooky village, Katara makes a special connection; the group investigate strange disappearances that occur during full moons.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 9
programme.desc: On the eve of the eclipse, Aang's worry overtakes him and his dreams become nightmares. Before long, he can't tell the difference between what's real and what's not.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 10
programme.desc: With the day of the eclipse upon them, the kids, along with a ragtag force of old friends, enact their long-planned invasion of the Fire Nation.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 11
programme.desc: As the invasion force fights their way to the Fire Nation capital, the kids help Aang find the Firelord in time for the eclipse, but after a few surprises.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 12
programme.desc: When the group seek refuge at the Western Air temple, they find someone they weren't expecting has been following them and hopes to join their group.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 13
programme.desc: As Zuko teaches Aang firebending, it turns out Aang isn't the only one who needs a lesson. The two set-out to learn the true meaning of Firebending from the original teachers.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 14
programme.desc: Sokka and Zuko head to the Fire Nation's most heavily guarded prison - the Boiling Rock - in hopes to find and break-out the captured invasion force.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 15
programme.desc: Sokka and Zuko have to rethink their escape plan after things go wrong. They end up getting help from a few unexpected sources.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 16
programme.desc: Katara sets out to confront the Fire Nation soldier who killed her mother. However, no one knows what she will do when she finds him.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 17
programme.desc: When the kids see a new play about themselves and all of their past adventures, they aren't happy with the production.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 18
programme.desc: The kids learn new information about Firelord Ozai's master plan and decide to strike sooner than planned, but they are unsure if Aang is ready.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 19
programme.desc: While Firelord Ozai begins his master plan, the gang tries to stop him. Meanwhile, Aang seeks advice from his past lives.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 20
programme.desc: Suki, Toph, and Sokka try to stop the Fire Lord's fleet before they hit land, while Azula prepares for her coronation day.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 21
programme.desc: Sokka and Toph manage to disable the airships while Zuko and Katara confront Azula. Aang finally faces off against the Fire Lord.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 1
programme.desc: Katara and Sokka, a brother and sister from the Southern Water Tribe, discover a twelve-year-old boy frozen in an iceberg. Katara wonders if this boy is the Avatar whom the world has been awaiting.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 2
programme.desc: Prince Zuko, a young Firebender whose mission in life is to capture the Avatar, tracks Aang down to the Southern Water Tribe village where Katara and Sokka live.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 3
programme.desc: Aang is eager to take Sokka and Katara to the Air Temple where he was raised. But upon arrival, it becomes apparent that the temple is not at all how Aang remembers it.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Shredderville
programme.desc: Because of all the destruction Shredder causes just trying to get rid of the Turtles, they lament that the world would be a better place had they never existed.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Bye - Bye Fly!
programme.desc: Plotting revenge, Baxter, who has been turned into a fly-like creature, delivers a borellium crystal to Krang and Shredder whose Technodrome is low in power.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): The Big Ripoff
programme.desc: The Technodrome is perilously close to running out of power as it teeters on the edge of a crumbling lava cliff deep within the bowels of the Earth.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): The Big Break-In
programme.desc: Krang and Shredder get the Technodrome rolling again and raise it to the centre of the Earth.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): The Big Blow-Out
programme.desc: Krang and Shredder raise the Technodrome to the surface and seize unlimited energy. The Turtles and the World face their darkest hour.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Plan Six from Outer Space
programme.desc: The Turtles launch the missile from the sewers positioned under the Technodrome. It transports Bebop, Rocksteady, Krang and Shredder back to Dimension X but explodes on impact; they survive.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Turtles of the Jungle
programme.desc: Donatello's idol, inventor mad-scientist Professor Willard creates the Molecular Intensifier, a machine to control growth of living things.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Michelangelo Toys Around
programme.desc: Michelangelo dreams he's being attacked by Tyranno-toys. He wakes up to hear April announcing the Toy Fair opening. Determined to go, Michelangelo disguises himself as a Turtle toy.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Peking Turtles
programme.desc: April O'Neil reports from the Uptown Museum about a display of artifacts from the 2000-year-old Ying Dynasty of China. The marble warriors were built to protect the world's largest pearl from being stolen from the Emperor's collection of jewels.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Shredder's Mother
programme.desc: The earth is experiencing global warming and Krang and Shredder threaten to expose it to increased catastrophic weather conditions.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Four Turtles and A Baby
programme.desc: The Neutrinos are attacked and their leaders, Zenter and Grizzla, are seized by Krang, Shredder and General Traag.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Turtlemaniac
programme.desc: Widespread thievery is discovered in the city when Ninja Turtle artifacts are found missing. April and Irma prowl for the pilfering poachers, the investigation leads the reporter to the estate of Monroe Q.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Rondo in New York
programme.desc: Word spreads that Oswald Oren, a nerdy Woody Allen-type student, has developed the Vitalizer - an experimental substance that brings inanimate objects to life. Scoundrels Shredder, Krang, Bebop and Rocksteady connive to steal the potion.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Planet of the Turtles
programme.desc: A commercial for the Personal Energy Projector (PEP), allowing the transfer of energy from one source to another, entices Krang. Targeting Earth, he drains the sphere's energy to strengthen the Technodrome.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Name That Toon
programme.desc: Krang threatens to vapourize the city by manipulating a Dematerializer, but a musical instrument that Howie, Irma's friend, plays around with, interferes with the device's programming.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Menace Maestro, Please
programme.desc: An invitation from April leads the Turtles, Irma and friend Howie to the haunted but renovated Floxy Music Hall, where the legendary Phantom of the Floxy resides.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Superhero for a Day
programme.desc: The half-shelled heroes find themselves competing with Bruce Bent, the Gadgetman, a self-proclaimed superhero from the past.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Back to the Egg
programme.desc: The foursome are dining out on their favourite food when Michelangelo and Leonardo are suddenly transformed into two five year-olds, thanks to Shredder's latest invention - an age-reversing serum.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Son of Return of the Fly II
programme.desc: After escaping from dimensional limbo, the Fly (alias Baxter Stockman) and his computer companion Z employ an experimental solid-energy generator to take over Channel Six.
programme.sub-title: Son of Return of the Fly II

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Raphael Knocks 'Em Dead!
programme.desc: House of Ha comedians are disappearing, right in the middle of their acts.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Bebop and Rocksteady Conquer the Universe
programme.desc: When Bebop and Rocksteady steal the Anxietron Ray, they use it to scare the dickens out of everyone in their path, including the Turtles.
programme.sub-title: Bebop and Rocksteady Conquer the Universe

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Raphael Meets His Match
programme.desc: Billionaire McDonald Crump makes the smallest pizzas in the world, and gives the biggest parties.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Slash - The Evil Turtles from Dimension X
programme.desc: Using some of Shredder's and Krang's supercharged mutagen, Bebop and Rocksteady turn pet turtle Slash into an evil super mutant.
programme.sub-title: Slash - The Evil Turtles from Dimension X

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Leonardo Lightens Up
programme.desc: Tired of constant nagging about discipline, Raphael, Michelangelo and Donatello use a Personality Modifier on Leonardo to get him to lighten up.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Were-Rats of Channel Six
programme.desc: Finding a canister of unstable mutagen, the Rat King turns April and Vernon of Channel Six News into giant were-rats. As the transformed newshounds terrorize the city, Bebop and Rocksteady arrive to collect some explosives for Shredder and Krang.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Funny-They Shrunk Michelangelo
programme.desc: Talbot Breech is short, fussy and the insane inventor of a shrinking ray. His hobby is to miniaturize the biggest ships afloat; only today, he's caught Michelangelo in his diabolical ray.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Big Zipp Attack!
programme.desc: Intent on stealing the Lofty Tower's rigidium spire, Shredder lets a dreaded Zipp loose on the city as a tactical diversion.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Donatello Makes Time
programme.desc: Donatello's newest invention, the Time Stopper, has fallen into the hands of unconventional scientist Lloyd Cycloyd.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Farewell, Lotus Blossom
programme.desc: Using a devious deception, Shredder tricks Lotus Blossom into fighting the Turtles for possession of the burial urn of Chakahachi, an ancient Japanese magician.

programme.title: Rebel Without a Fin
programme.desc: In a dark plot to rule the world, Dr. Polidorius has created a man-fish using an evolution accelerator.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Rhino-Man
programme.desc: When multi-billionaire J. Gordon Hungerdunger sponsors a superhero competition, the city goes crazy with good guys.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Michelangelo Meets Bugman
programme.desc: Meet Bugman: he's Michelangelo's favourite comic book mutant superhero of all time. And today, he's real and in trouble.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Poor Little Rich Turtle
programme.desc: Desperate for the formula to Shellhammer Chemical's super rocket fuel, Krang and Shredder send Rocksteady and Bebop to kidnap poor little rich brat Buffy Shellhammer.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): What's Michelangelo Good For?
programme.desc: Dr. Lesseau is stealing animals from the city zoo to use for experiments.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): The Dimension X Story
programme.desc: April and Vernon of Channel Six News each need a big story, and Shredder's challenge to the Turtles of a fight to the finish sounds like just the ticket.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Donatello's Degree
programme.desc: To pick up a correspondence course degree addressed to "Miss Donna Tello," Donatello talks Irma into playing genius-for-a-day.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): The Big Cufflink Caper
programme.desc: When Shredder hires gonzo gangster Big Louie to find the explosive Cufflinks of Cathay, the Turtles go undercover with the mob to get to the bottom of the plot. Gunfights galore lead to a final shootout at the taffy factory at high midnight.

programme.title: Riptide: Chapel Of Glass
programme.desc: As the lieutenant's wedding nears, a case the guys are working on strikes close to home, and may call into question everything she knows.

programme.title: Riptide: If You Can't Beat 'Em, Join 'Em
programme.desc: The Riptide Detective Agency is hired to consult for a new detective television show. The lead actors follow the guys around for over a week while investigating an actual case.

programme.title: Riptide: Echoes
programme.desc: While in a firefight, one of the guys is shot, and the others deal with the repercussions of what had to be done.

programme.title: Riptide: Pilot
programme.desc: Nick Ryder and Cody Allen leave their former employment, taking tourists on trips by helicopter or by boat, and start their own private detective agency.

programme.title: Riptide: Conflict Of Interest
programme.desc: A girl whom Cody dated. runs away from her husband and goes to the boat looking for him. But they're not there but Murray is and he offers to help her.

programme.title: Riptide: Somebody's Killing The Great Geeks Of America
programme.desc: An attempt is made on Natalie Kramer's life and her associates in the so-called brain trust group have already been assasinated.
programme.sub-title: Somebody's Killing The Great Geeks Of America

programme.title: Riptide: Hatchet Job
programme.desc: Although happy at first that a client found their way to their detective agency, the boys quickly discover she's an escapee from a mental institution.

programme.title: Riptide: The Mean Green Love Machine
programme.desc: A girl from Mama Jo's crew is afraid something has happened to her father and the Riptide Agency goes to Mexico to find out in what kind of trouble he's in.

programme.title: Riptide: Diamonds Are For Never
programme.desc: While in the theater watching Bambi, Murray encounters an upset woman. It turns out she just witnessed the killing of a good friend of hers who turns out to be a diamond smuggler.

programme.title: Riptide: The Hardcase
programme.desc: A young woman spurned is a suspect in a murder.

programme.title: Riptide: Four-Eyes
programme.desc: The boys are hired by a guy to keep tabs on his wife. It seems he wants to divorce her and he wants ammo to avoid giving her alimony.

programme.title: Riptide: #1 With A Bullet
programme.desc: When a music star is killed in a car accident and the equally famous passenger gets injured, the Riptide agency gets hired by his fanclub to deliver flowers to his hospital bed.

programme.title: Riptide: Long Distance Daddy
programme.desc: Nick's sponsor child comes from Cambodia to the USA so his sister can undergo heart surgery.

programme.title: Riptide: Double Your Pleasure
programme.desc: Cody's flirt with a pretty girl sends the boys on a search for her apparently missing sister. Her ties to a mobster make them a target for him and his goons.

programme.title: Riptide: Raiders Of The Lost Sub
programme.desc: Well educated, but just as goofy, Murray's sister shows up unexpectedly, and persuades the boys to look for a sunken WW2 German submarine.

programme.title: Riptide: Something Fishy
programme.desc: Boz and Nick both fall for the same beautiful dolphin-trainer, whose charges become implicated as accomplices in a drug-smuggling scheme.

programme.title: Riptide: Where The Girls Are
programme.desc: The Riptide trio is tasked with protecting three high maintenance women from kidnappers during their California vacation.

programme.title: Mr. D: Job Opportunity
programme.desc: When a job opens up in the phys ed department, Gerry sees his chance at his dream job. Meanwhile, Lisa is assigned a student teacher from hell – who happens to be Callaghan’s niece.

programme.title: Mr. D: Guest Speaker
programme.desc: Gerry needs to find a guest speaker for Career Day. Dwyer supposedly has a good one, and Gerry wants to outdo him. Robert has a fraternity reunion this weekend, and he wants to avoid catching the sickness that’s going around at all costs.

programme.title: Mr. D: Quiz Cup
programme.desc: As Lisa takes over the school’s Quiz Cup academic team and attempts to get them successfully through their upcoming tournament, Bobbi is uncomfortably trying to guide her grade 5’s through their health unit.

programme.title: Mr. D: Field Trip
programme.desc: Gerry has to help Bobbi supervise her Grade 5/6 field trip to the museum, while Jeff and Robert cover his classes back at Xavier.

programme.title: Mr. D: The Basketball Diaries
programme.desc: Gerry is desperate for his first win of the basketball season, but when he finds out his opponents are coached by his ex and her husband, he becomes emotionally involved.

programme.title: Mr. D: Charity Day
programme.desc: Gerry decides to use a boxing match at the school’s annual Charity Day to settle his competition with Mr. Dwyer for the title of Mr. D once and for all.

programme.title: Mr. D: Gerry's Evaluation
programme.desc: When Gerry is evaluated by a member of the board, he must go out of his way to prove that he is great at his job, or risk severe punishment.

programme.title: Mr. D: Late Shift
programme.desc: Gerry takes a second job at Barrels to pay for a new car but struggles to juggle both.

programme.title: Mr. D: World Religions
programme.desc: Gerry's 'World Religions' unit goes off course when he brings his personal views into the classroom.

programme.title: Mr. D: Overnight Trip
programme.desc: Gerry concocts a scheme to get his class to go to Boston so that he and Bill can watch a Celtics game.

programme.title: Mr. D: The Crush
programme.desc: Gerry develops a crush on the Scottish mother of one of his most annoying students.

programme.title: Mr. D: The Other Woman
programme.desc: When Bobbi and her long-term boyfriend Craig break up again, Gerry is there for the rebound... Craig's rebound.

programme.title: Mr. D: The Date
programme.desc: When Bobbi and her long-term boyfriend Craig break up again, Gerry is there for the rebound... Craig's rebound.

programme.title: Mr. D: Gerry's Favourite Couple
programme.desc: Xavier's favourite senior couple, Sean and Miranda ('Searanda'), are on the rocks. Seeing himself in Sean, Gerry decides to meddle in their relationship - they have to stay together or Gerry will suffer a deep personal loss.

programme.title: Mr. D: Poker Night
programme.desc: When Gerry comes across a down and out Daniel Negreanu, he orchestrates a staff poker night in order to get Daniel back on his feet.

programme.title: Mr. D: Staff Retreat
programme.desc: The staff are involved in an elaborate trust game that accidently reveals some of their darkest secrets.

programme.title: Mr. D: Culture Day
programme.desc: Culture Day at Xavier and each teacher has been asked to model their classroom after a country. Gerry pushes for Scotland, only to find that Dwyer already has it.

programme.title: Mr. D: Strip Club
programme.desc: Gerry suspects that Dwyer is moonlighting as a stripper and there's only one way to find out for sure. Gerry and Simon are going to spend a night at the strip club...an all male strip club.

programme.title: Mr. D: Slam Dunk
programme.desc: Gerry tries to convince Bobbi to give him a senior boys basketball team next season. Robert learns that his year end evaluation came with one complaint.

programme.title: Mr. D: Parent Teacher Night
programme.desc: Gerry has only one opportunity to meet a hockey legend and have his priceless Team Canada jersey autographed.

programme.title: Mr. D: Old School
programme.desc: Gerry helps Lisa in her faculty fashion show.

programme.title: Key & Peele: Manly Tears
programme.desc: A tough guy cries in front of his crew, and substitute teacher Mr. Nostrand does not play.

programme.title: Key & Peele: Dueling Hats
programme.desc: One man's bikini-clad woman is another man's mystery, and two friends step up their hat game.

programme.title: Key & Peele: Les Mis
programme.desc: Mr. Garvey clashes with students over club photos, and President Obama addresses the NSA scandal.

programme.title: Key & Peele: East/West Bowl Rap
programme.desc: Two women prepare to fight outside a club, and the Valets wonder why people mess with the Batmans.

programme.title: Key & Peele: Slap-Ass
programme.desc: Two slaves try to find a way out of fighting to the death, and a member of a Latin gang proves his toughness.

programme.title: Key & Peele: Boarding Group One

programme.title: Key & Peele: Obama Shutdown

programme.title: Nathan For You: Nail Salon/Fun
programme.desc: Nathan discovers a snafu in his plan to offer valet services at a nail salon and embarks on a mission to prove that people enjoy his company.

programme.title: Nathan For You: The Hero
programme.desc: Nathan organizes a death-defying stunt in an attempt to turn a regular guy into a national hero.

programme.title: Nathan For You: Nathan For You: A Celebration
programme.desc: Anthony Napoli and Nathan revisit some of the people the show has helped, including a ghost realtor, a teen vandal and a centerfold-turned-private eye.

programme.title: Nathan For You: The Richards Tip
programme.desc: Nathan stages an elaborate stunt to make it seem like comedian Michael Richards left a $10,000 tip at a deli.

programme.title: Nathan For You: Chili Shop/Massage Parlor
programme.desc: Nathan devises a method of selling chili in secret and founds a charity to help a massage parlor upsell its clients.

programme.title: Nathan For You: Andy vs. Uber
programme.desc: Nathan reteams with an old client to enlist several disgruntled taxi drivers for a plot to sabotage Uber's business from the inside.

programme.title: Nathan For You: The Anecdote
programme.desc: Nathan goes to great lengths to create the perfect talk show anecdote.

programme.title: Nathan For You: Shipping Logistics Company
programme.desc: Nathan teaches an international exporter how to ship smoke alarms tax-free.

programme.title: Nathan For You: Computer Repair/Psychic
programme.desc: Nathan helps a computer repair shop earn the public's trust, and a psychic's marketing turns personal.

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Big Nickel
programme.desc: Andy’s attempt to avoid Swarek is thwarted whenbothare assigned to a prisoner transport. When things go awry and theinmate breaks loose, the two officers are led on a cat-and-mouse foot chase through the meandering woods.

programme.title: Rookie Blue: To Serve or Protect
programme.desc: What was to be a routine day for Andy is abruptly put on holdwhen herex-copper father, Tommy, confesses that he might have committed a serious crime during one of his alcohol-induced blackouts

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Judgment Day
programme.desc: There’s a nervous tension in the air on Judgment Day for all therookies at 15 Division who will have to undergo make-or-break assessments by Staff Sergeant Frank.

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Takedown
programme.desc: Andy and Chris accidentally screw up one of the biggest drug busts of the decade when they arrest one of the players. In an effort to save the operation, Swarek and Andy go undercover to make the drug buy.

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Butterflies
programme.desc: Andy's world explodes when a fresh-faced university student is killed in a random shooting, and a bullet hits Andy, lodging in her vest.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation: Who Are You?
programme.desc: Department protocol is violated when Catherine investigates her ex-husband's rape accusation.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation: Anonymous
programme.desc: A man is found dead in his bathtub with a tape recording saying he has committed suicide. Grisson, Catherine and Sara investigate the case that becomes more complicated when Grisson's fingerprint is found at the scene crime.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation: Unfriendly Skies
programme.desc: The team investigates the death of a passenger aboard a commercial airliner. They soon realize that the forensic evidence and passenger statements don't quite add up.

programme.desc: A black girl claims to have been raped by white police officers.

programme.title: Law & Order: Life Choice

programme.title: Law & Order: A Death in the Family

programme.title: Law & Order: The Violence of Summer

programme.title: Law & Order: The Torrents of Greed: Part 1

programme.title: Law & Order: The Torrents of Greed: Part 2

programme.title: Law & Order: Mushrooms

programme.title: Law & Order: The Secret Sharers

programme.title: Supersize Vs Superskinny
programme.desc: Tipping the scales just over 6 stones, 41-year-old Elizabeth Young thinks she's found the elixer to eternal youth-starving herself.

programme.title: Untold Stories of the ER: Director Down
programme.desc: A ruptured brain aneurysm threatens to kill the ER's medical director, making Dr Yamarick face one of his most difficult moments.

programme.title: Untold Stories of the ER: Oh, Deer!
programme.desc: A college student's head is impaled by a trophy deer's antlers; a car crash victim leads the doctor to believe her baby may still be at the accident scene; a nurse's ex-boyfriend brings his new girlfriend to the ER and the nurse must help save her life.

programme.title: Untold Stories of the ER: Dr. Bikini
programme.desc: A resort doctor must treat a man critically injured by a boat propeller; a discharged patient sets off a deadly chain of events by getting a ride from his designated driver; the ER comes to a standstill when the computers and the head nurse are down.

programme.title: Untold Stories of the ER: Til Death Do Us Part
programme.desc: When a bride on her way to her wedding suffers facial injuries in a car accident she's rushed to the ER.

programme.title: Untold Stories of the ER: OLD SCHOOL MEDICINE
programme.desc: A surgeon requires urgent treatment after falling off a bed while trying to help his patient; a man with a slashed wrist has a startling secret; a woman gives birth to an intact amniotic sac.

programme.title: Untold Stories of the ER: CAN'T STOP ITCHING
programme.desc: A man itching from poison oak exposure turns out to also have maggots burrowing into an injury on his back; a young woman has a bleeding lip, but doctors can't find the source of the bleed; three car accident victims are admitted to the ER.

programme.title: Untold Stories of the ER: Medieval Mayhem
programme.desc: A man injured in a medieval roleplaying battle has a sword impaled in his head; a critically ill patient is so afraid of germs he won't allow doctors to treat him; two patients with the same life-threatening symptoms arrive separately from a fashion show.

programme.title: Untold Stories of the ER: We Have A Heartbeat
programme.desc: A carjacker has shot a policewoman in the chest; A homeless woman has cellulitis; A drug dealer is unresponsive after having been beaten. Two middle-aged men with severe burns; A man in his 70s has been found unresponsive in a public place.

programme.title: PRIDEtv
programme.desc: PRIDEtv is the lifestyle television channel for the LGBTQI+ community, open-minded, featuring award-winning arthouse films, captivating documentaries, popular queer series, short films, reality shows, and original TV shows. Your Pride starts here!

programme.title: Top Million Dollar Agent: Nice Family Home (Part 1)
programme.desc: Jessica and Mark are a young couple living and working in Thailand after meeting there several years ago and falling in love. They are looking for a permanent home in Bangkok, and after chatting with her friend Mae.

programme.title: Top Million Dollar Agent: Nice Family Home (Part 2)
programme.desc: With the help of local agents Max Gloeckner and Nala Gill, will Mike be able to find a place that suits the whole family? This episode features the last two of four properties, as well as the reveal of which house the clients decide to purchase.

programme.title: Top Million Dollar Agent: Clever Income (Part 1)
programme.desc: After helping them find a home last season, Inez is enlisted by Martin and Cheryl to help them find the perfect investment property. While Cheryl wants a property with minimal work and no landlord responsibilities.

programme.title: Top Million Dollar Agent: Clever Income (Part 2)
programme.desc: This episode features the last two of four properties, as well as the reveal of which house the clients decide to purchase, with special guest appearances by interior design expert Shelley Alexanian and guest agent Mo Loulou.

programme.title: Top Million Dollar Agent: Open Concept (Part 1)
programme.desc: This week's episode features Cambridge realtor extraordinaire Steve Bailey as he helps couple Dan and Melinda search for the perfect home. It's a real battle of contemporary vs. traditional as Dan and Melinda.

programme.title: Top Million Dollar Agent: Open Concept (Part 2)
programme.desc: This episode features the last two of four properties, as well as the reveal of which house the clients decide to purchase, with a special guest appearance by interior design expert Shelley Alexanian.

programme.title: Top Million Dollar Agent: A Big Investment (Part 1)
programme.desc: Vancouver-based couple Jim and Shannon are looking to relocate to their hometown of Toronto with their two daughters. With a budget of 10 million dollars, they enlist the help of savvy realtor Sofie Kehdi.

programme.title: Top Million Dollar Agent: A Big Investment (Part 2)
programme.desc: This episode features the last two of four properties, as well as the reveal of which house the clients decide to purchase, with a special appearance by guest agent Tyrone N. Steer.

programme.title: Top Million Dollar Agent: Magical Home (Part 1)
programme.desc: Off on another adventure! This episode takes Mike Donia on a whirlwind tour of Southeast Asia as he searches for a home for his clients, Antonio and Kim. Featuring properties in Thailand.

programme.title: Top Million Dollar Agent: Magical Home (Part 2)
programme.desc: Off on another adventure! This episode takes Mike Donia on a whirlwind tour of Southeast Asia as he searches for a home for his clients, Antonio and Kim. Featuring properties in Thailand.

programme.title: Top Million Dollar Agent: Income for a Rainy Day (Part 1)
programme.desc: Vezi and Deborah love the house they purchased last season in Stouffville, but they are ready to make the move to the big city. They enlist the help of Inez Kudryk to show them the best properties she can find in Toronto.

programme.title: Top Million Dollar Agent: Income for a Rainy Day (Part 2)
programme.desc: Vezi and Deborah love the house they purchased last season in Stouffville, but they are ready to make the move to the big city. They enlist the help of Inez Kudryk to show them the best properties she can find in Toronto.

programme.title: Top Million Dollar Agent: Tricky Choice (Part 1)
programme.desc: Laura and Steven are a young couple with an expanding family, and are ready to take the next steps in home ownership. They want a large plot of land for their young children to run around and enjoy nature.

programme.title: Top Million Dollar Agent: Tricky Choice (Part 2)
programme.desc: Laura and Steven are a young couple with an expanding family, and are ready to take the next steps in home ownership. They want a large plot of land for their young children to run around and enjoy nature.

programme.title: Top Million Dollar Agent: We Bought a Resort (Part 1)
programme.desc: Sofie Kehdi heads back to Belize to help husband and wife team Rachel and Ben size up some resort properties. Along with their investors, Rachel and Ben are looking to purchase a resort on the island of Ambergris Caye.

programme.title: Top Million Dollar Agent: We Bought a Resort (Part 2)
programme.desc: Sofie Kehdi heads back to Belize to help husband and wife team Rachel and Ben size up some resort properties. Along with their investors, Rachel and Ben are looking to purchase a resort on the island of Ambergris Caye.

programme.title: Top Million Dollar Agent: Net Zero
programme.desc: Julie and James are looking for a new home to raise their two boys. James is in the tech industry and would love an energy efficient home.

programme.title: Top Million Dollar Agent: Wow Factor
programme.desc: Giulia and Scott have recently come into an inheritance and want the house of their dreams. Currently, they live in a modest bungalow in a busy neighbourhood but would prefer to live in a secluded house.

programme.title: Top Million Dollar Agent: My Daughter's Plan
programme.desc: Kevin is a retired, successful businessman. He is a single dad to Shannon and Jennifer. Shannon has been accepted into the Ontario Veterinarian College at the University of Guelph.

programme.title: Top Million Dollar Agent: Feels Like Home
programme.desc: Laura is on the hunt for a new home for long time clients Marino and Paula. The couple and their three kids would like a spacious house with a country feel to escape their hectic lifestyles.

programme.title: Top Million Dollar Agent: Century Homes
programme.desc: Louise, Jason, and their two children have been living in Europe for the past 10 years, but now they would like to be closer to their family in Canada. Louise absolutely adores the European aesthetic.

programme.title: Top Million Dollar Agent: Waterfront
programme.desc: Diogo is a dedicated musician working on his new album. He has been debating between moving to Miami or staying in Canada. Toronto is closer to his family and where he feels at home with his music.

programme.title: Top Million Dollar Agent: Retirement
programme.desc: Elizabeth and Michael are retired and want to move closer to their kids and grandchildren. They want to downsize from their two-story house into a bungalow. Luckily, Eve knows all about luxury bungalows.

programme.title: Top Million Dollar Agent: Sweet Country Home
programme.desc: Tomarra and Rob had just married and blended their two families. As a new family, they want to transition to a quiet neighbourhood away from the hustle and bustle of Toronto. Steve is up for the challenge.

programme.title: Top Million Dollar Agent: A Smart Decision
programme.desc: Darlene and Bruce are in the market for a new home and have enlisted Laura to help them out. Darlene's one request is that they stay close to their current home, where their daughter goes to school.

programme.title: Top Million Dollar Agent: Pool House
programme.desc: Kathryn and Neil are true urbanites. They love what downtown Toronto has to offer. When Neil found out his company was relocating to Guelph, they weren't thrilled.

programme.title: Top Million Dollar Agent: Love the Location
programme.desc: Ashley and Ali are ready to take their relationship and living situation to the next level. The young entrepreneurs are prepared to move into a house, but the one thing they can't agree on is where to live.

programme.title: Top Million Dollar Agent: Big Move
programme.desc: Stephanie is making a big move from BC to Guelph to be closer to her son John and his family. She doesn't want the move to be a hassle and is looking for an accessible, decent-sized home for her grandchildren and visitors from BC.

programme.title: Top Million Dollar Agent: My Favourite Homes
programme.desc: Steve Bailey, Mike Donia and Daryl King review their favourite homes. Steve takes us down memory lane to his 18th century farmhouse, and another home with a stunning infinity pool.

programme.title: Top Million Dollar Agent: House For an Athlete
programme.desc: ??George is a retired basket ball player, and Mada is an international model. For a man over 7 feet tall, finding the perfect house might be a challenge. Danielle knows high ceilings come in all shapes and sizes.

programme.title: Top Million Dollar Agent: Treetops
programme.desc: Suhail and Niki have busy schedules. He's a marketing director and she's a doctor so she's often on call for a hospital downtown.

programme.title: Top Million Dollar Agent: Above and Beyond
programme.desc: Wendy and Daniel are looking to downsize after their kids have moved out, but still want an elegant home. She's a physical therapist and she's a business analyst.

programme.title: Top Million Dollar Agent: Energized
programme.desc: Danielle is helping quite a pair, Joseph is a chiropractor and Nadia is an aerospace engineer. They're looking for a home to start a family. Not only that, they want space to host their extended family. Will it be as difficult as rocket science?

programme.title: Top Million Dollar Agent: Fabulous
programme.desc: Janelle and Manuel are young professionals looking for more space. With one child tagging along on the tour already, they need a place for their growing family. They might need to do some renovations, but they want everything to be perfect.

programme.title: Top Million Dollar Agent: Fun House
programme.desc: These two business owners Joseph and Heather work hard and want to play hard! They're looking for a place to entertain guests, and Daryl's got some amazing homes to show them.

programme.title: Top Million Dollar Agent: Family Home
programme.desc: Vipin’s family of four are in the market to purchase their own dream home in the Greater Toronto Area.

programme.title: Top Million Dollar Agent: House of Dreams
programme.desc: Phil and Claire, a newly wed couple, are searching for their dream home in Castlemore.

programme.title: Top Million Dollar Agent: Fabulous Luxury
programme.desc: Elvira and Robert are looking for a home with a history, but want to make sure it is post-renovation.

programme.desc: How well do you know your special someone? The Cheaters Detective Agency is here to find out. All the dirty little secrets are going to come out on the long-running hit reality series airing 24/7 on Pluto TV.

programme.title: COPS: Cops Fighting to Lose
programme.desc: Shots fired in a park after hours leads to a messy situation for one officer, and a disturbed man with a gun takes responding officers on a harrowing chase.

programme.title: COPS: Cops Mom Still Loves You
programme.desc: Officers track down a suspect who eluded them earlier, a suspicious vehicle takes off at the sight of police, and a man gets busted for possession in front of his mom.

programme.title: COPS: Cops The Young and the Reckless
programme.desc: Police catch up to a man with warrants and a history of resisting arrest, a fidgety driver arouses suspicion, and a minor with beers in his pants has to answer to his mom.
programme.sub-title: Cops The Young and the Reckless

programme.title: COPS: Cops Too Many Cooks
programme.desc: A fleeing driver becomes cooperative once he reaches his destination, a woman gets feisty with police, and police respond to a domestic dispute involving a frying pan.

programme.title: COPS: Cops Second Time Around
programme.desc: Deputies are led on a chase by a driver they pursued just weeks earlier, and a man caught with drugs tries to pin the blame on his girlfriend.

programme.title: COPS: Cops Party in a Box
programme.desc: Officers review dashcam footage after a suspect claims force was used against him unjustly, and a weed enthusiast drops some knowledge on police about the founding fathers.

programme.title: COPS: Cops Two in the Bush
programme.desc: A woman leads police on a dangerous chase, a driver is remorseful for the damage he's caused, and a man's denial of solicitation is undermined by his open fly.

programme.title: COPS: Cops Undeniably Fishy
programme.desc: A man loses his friend and finds trouble, officers stop a vehicle they believe was involved in a shooting, and a suspicious vehicle leads to a suspicious story.

programme.title: COPS: Cops Nothing to See Here
programme.desc: A man's mole gives him away when he tries to fool police with a fake name, a drunken man shows officers he has nothing to hide, and a reckless driver imperils a neighborhood.

programme.title: COPS: Cops Bible Buddies
programme.desc: Numerous patrol cars give chase to a man on a dirt bike refusing to yield, and an alleged armed robber is upfront about his reasons for running from police when approached.

programme.title: COPS: Cops Shaking Like a Paint Mixer
programme.desc: A man blames the weed found in his car on his absent nephew, a suspect in custody starts to convulse, and police respond to a call about an armed man tripping on bath salts.
programme.sub-title: Cops Shaking Like a Paint Mixer

programme.title: COPS: Cops Love Gone Bad
programme.desc: A man on a dirt bike tries to elude police while dumping his firearm, and after breaking up a parking lot drug deal, an officer advises a young suspect to make better choices.

programme.title: COPS: Cops Crying Over Spilled Milk
programme.desc: After chasing down a suspect on foot, officers retrieve a fully loaded revolver from his pants, and police respond to a call about a man wielding a knife outside a bar.

programme.title: COPS: Cops Front Door Felony
programme.desc: A fleeing motorcyclist tries to outsmart officers by hiding his bike in a retail garden area, and a concerned citizen reports seeing a man steal a package from a porch.

programme.title: COPS: Cops What's in the Box
programme.desc: A jaywalking citation escalates to resisting arrest, an SUV contains more needles than one officer is willing to deal with, and a lovers' spat draws the attention of a patrol.

programme.title: COPS: Cops Trouble in Paradise
programme.desc: A man refusing to drop his knife tests an officer's patience, neighbors hold an alleged thief until police arrive, and a couple of volatile newlyweds need police intervention.

programme.title: COPS: Cops Carjacked Up
programme.desc: Officers spot a suspect running down the street with a knife, the driver of a stolen car takes off on foot after he's pulled over, and police find carjacked vehicles.
